title: Vendor the AdaEngine fork as Vendor/AdaEngine and define ownership boundaries
summary: Add the AdaEngine fork as a pinned submodule and wire the new app workspace to consume it reproducibly.
scope: Point Apps/Client dependencies at the vendored engine
Document what belongs in engine vs app layer
Ensure local dev and CI can resolve the engine from repo state
deliverables: dependency wiring from Apps/Client to Vendor/AdaEngine
developer notes for updating the pinned engine revision
acceptance_criteria: Fresh clone can initialize submodules and build the app workspace
No dependency points at a personal local path
Ownership boundary between app code and engine code is documented
